name: Zollner Golf Course
about: Zollner Golf Course is an 18-hole championship facility offering a full range of amenities including a state-of-the-art pro shop, a bar and banquet facility called Club Z, and various practice areas. It provides both outdoor golf experiences and indoor golf simulator access. The venue caters to a diverse clientele, from experienced golfers to beginners, with a focus on providing a quality golf experience alongside social and event opportunities. Membership options are available that include access to additional facilities like a bowling alley and fitness centers.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to indoor golf simulators for year-round practice and play
Premium club fitting services with Callaway and Mizuno fitting carts
State-of-the-art pro shop with a wide selection of equipment and apparel
Versatile event space (Club Z) for hosting tournaments and outings
Membership perks extend to Trine University's fitness centers and bowling alley

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining service available at Club Z with catering options for events.
State-of-the-art bar with four 65” flat-screen televisions, projector screen, and a Bottoms Up tap system.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you are welcome to bring your own clubs, custom club fitting services are available with Callaway and Mizuno fitting carts to help you optimize your equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service bar and dining facility (Club Z) where food and drinks are available for purchase. Outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes on the simulator is not specified in the provided content.

faq.question: Is Zollner Golf Course kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers programs for all skill levels, including juniors and future golfers, making it a family-friendly environment.
